name: coldstorage-ui
//trustedDependencies: Bun blocks postinstall scripts by default; Electron downloads its binary in one — without this, `task ui:dev` fails with 'Electron uninstall'. Only the GUI launch needs the binary (build/typecheck/test don't).
description: ColdStorage control panel (Electron/React) — a thin client over the coldstored control socket.

scripts.typecheck: bun run typecheck:node && bun run typecheck:web
scripts.test: bun test src/renderer/src src/main/config.test.ts src/main/auth src/main/vault src/main/entitlement src/main/updater
